vulnerability_class: Sensitive data exposure via attacker-triggered debug logging (sample app)
source: Attacker-controlled query parameter debugRequest=true and attacker-controlled headers/body
sink: Server logs (REQ_DEBUG lines) containing headers and request body
missing_guard: No auth/allowlist check before enabling debug mode in sample filter chain
prerequisites: Deployment uses sample filters and logs are accessible to unauthorized or lower-priv users
impact_if_true: Potential disclosure of credentials/PII via logs
missing_evidence_needed_for_promotion: Proof that vulnerable sample configuration is deployed in bounty scope
Proof of attacker-accessible logs or privilege crossover
